title: Espionage Resource System
description: Spying requires spending money and effort. Unlike typical hidden resource gates, espionage reveals competitor information in bits and pieces over time. Investment in spying yields gradual intel about rival operations.
definition-of-done: Espionage budget allocation system. Spying produces intel over time. Higher investment yields faster/more intel. Espionage costs visible in finances.
testing-plan: Verify espionage budget allocation. Test intel generation over time. Verify investment-to-intel scaling. Test cost tracking.
